title: rubus instans
intro: Rubus instans, also known as the Bramble or Blackthorn, is a type of shrub that belongs to the Rubus genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Rubus instans include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Rubus instans include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from a variety of health issues.
